hooks.command: jq -r '.cwd // "."' | { read -r d; nohup "$HOME/.claude/bin/ClaudeNotify.app/Contents/MacOS/ClaudeNotify" 'Claude Code' "Finished in $(basename "$d")" "open -a 'Visual Studio Code' '$d'" Glass >/dev/null 2>&1 & } 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); d=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd // "."'); m=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.message // "Needs your attention"'); nohup "$HOME/.claude/bin/ClaudeNotify.app/Contents/MacOS/ClaudeNotify" "Claude Code — $(basename "$d")" "$m" "open -a 'Visual Studio Code' '$d'" Funk >/dev/null 2>&1 &
